ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last modified */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run of an experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the run was conducted */,
  "buffer_size" INTEGER /* Buffer size used in the run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the run */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the run */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the run was last modified */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the run was conducted (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "hardware_details" TEXT /* Details about the hardware used */,
  "software_versions" TEXT /* Versions of software dependencies used in the run */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for reproducibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., UCB, Epsilon-Greedy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the algorithm */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last modified */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "paper_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the paper or documentation describing the algorithm */,
  "source_code_link" TEXT /* Link to the source code of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., HY_UCB, HY_Epsilon_Greedy) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metric */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last modified */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., reward, accuracy, loss) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experiment_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "additional_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each additional metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the additional metric (e.g., EP) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the additional metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metric */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last modified */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the additional metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the additional metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experiment_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user record was last modified */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment or metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment or metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experiment_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an algorithm */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a run */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the run */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_versions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experiment_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a performance metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "additional_metric_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an additional metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_metric_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES additional_metrics ("metric_id")
)
